name: Teamwork: Unit Name
official_rules_text: While a unit with the Teamwork keyword is within 2 of an allied unit that has the unit name speci/f_ied by the Teamwork keyword, if either unit gains 1 or more Aim tokens or 1 or more Dodge tokens, the other unit gains 1 token of the same type.
description: While a unit with the Teamwork keyword is within 2 of an allied unit that has the unit name speci/f_ied by the Teamwork keyword, if either unit gains 1 or more Aim tokens or 1 or more Dodge tokens, the other unit gains 1 token of the same type.
